name: chatgato
description: A Stream Deck control surface for OpenAI Codex in the ChatGPT desktop app.

scripts.build: esbuild src/plugin.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node24 --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=com.marco.chatgato.sdPlugin/bin/plugin.js --sourcemap
scripts.pack: npm run build && streamdeck pack com.marco.chatgato.sdPlugin --output dist --force
scripts.restart: pkill -x 'Stream Deck' 2>/dev/null || true; while pgrep -x 'Stream Deck' >/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; streamdeck restart com.marco.chatgato
scripts.link: npm run build && streamdeck link com.marco.chatgato.sdPlugin && npm run restart
